title: Endless End
description: Gives the End the absolute Update it deserves. But maybe not the most vanilla…
body:
![Endless End Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/221150302adf2094df414e439728e4b0d1052c40_0.webp)

**Endless End is a End exspansion modpack that turns the end into vibrant purple celestial islands with several biomes and structures to explore and find.**

**its thrilling and fun to explore! grab some snacks go to the end and have fun and, i hope you enjoy!**

This modpack will ovehaul some structures and add new ones, it will also add new biomes with their own blocks and sturctures.


<details>
<summary>Biomes</summary>
|
  Dreaming Den
|
  Acidburnt Abysses
|
  Poise Forest
|
</details>


<details>
<summary>OverHauled Structures</summary>
|
  Stronghold
|
  EndCity
|
  Main End Island
|
  End Gateway
|
  End Portal
|
</details>


<details>
<summary>Some New Structures</summary>
|
  Ferrous Chamber
|
  Monastery
|
  Sun Grove
|
  End Villager Trader Ship
|
  End Villager Outpost
|
  
</details>
